user.title: Add a Tuya IR AC unit

manual.title: Connect to your Tuya IR hub
manual.description: Enter the local network details for the Tuya IR hub that will control this AC unit. Use the `tinytuya wizard` command-line tool to extract the device ID and local key from your Tuya/Smart Life account.

cloud.title: Tuya Cloud API credentials
cloud.description: Enter the Access ID and Access Secret from your Tuya IoT Platform Cloud project so we can fetch your device list instead of typing device_id/local_key manually. These credentials are only used here, during setup, and are saved so future 'add AC unit' flows can reuse them -- runtime IR control always stays local.

cloud_hub.title: Select your Tuya IR hub
cloud_hub.description: Pick the device that is your physical Tuya IR hub.

cloud_subdevice.title: Select a paired remote (optional)
cloud_subdevice.description: This hub has device(s) registered in the Tuya cloud. Picking one only prefills a friendly name/brand guess below -- it does not change which physical hub gets contacted.

cloud_host.title: Hub network address
cloud_host.description: The Tuya Cloud API can't see your local network, so enter the hub's local IP address.

variant.title: Select a starting codeset
variant.description: Choose a built-in code variant for {brand}. Built-in codes are best-effort and may not match your exact model -- you can override any individual command later using this entity's Learn Command option.

error.invalid_auth: Could not authenticate -- check the local key (manual) or Access ID/Secret (cloud).
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect. Check the host/IP address and that the hub is powered on and reachable on your network.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while connecting to the hub.
error.no_devices_found: No devices were found in this Tuya account.

abort.already_configured: This AC unit (same hub device and name) is already configured.

init.title: Learn Command
init.description: Select which command(s) you want to (re)learn from your real remote. Learned codes always take precedence over the built-in codeset.

capture.title: Press the button now
capture.description: Point your real remote at the Tuya IR hub and press the button for: {state_key}. Capturing will time out after {timeout} seconds if no button is pressed.

error.learn_timeout: No button press was detected in time. Try again.
error.cannot_connect: Lost connection to the hub while learning. Check that the hub is still reachable, then try again.

abort.no_keys_selected: No commands were selected to learn.
